title: Hard luck for Eagle Stars
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Sedgefield Eagle...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Sedgefield Eagle Stars Rugby Club hosted the All Blacks from Oudtshoorn this past Saturday, and lost the game, 27-17.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Sedgefield Eagle Stars Rugby Club hosted the All Blacks from Oudtshoorn this past Saturday, and lost the game, 27-17."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This SWD Super B League match was played at Smutsville in Grassy Park.","html":"This SWD Super B League match was played at Smutsville in Grassy Park."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a tough encounter, with Eagle Stars not willing to buckle under any sort of pressure the men in black initially threw at them.","html":"It was a tough encounter, with Eagle Stars not willing to buckle under any sort of pressure the men in black initially threw at them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At half-time the visitors had their noses only slightly in front, at 10-7, with all to play for.","html":"At half-time the visitors had their noses only slightly in front, at 10-7, with all to play for."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the second half, the All Blacks were able to poke more holes in the defensive system of Eagle Stars, earning them two more tries, which proved vital in securing them a valuable away victory.","html":"In the second half, the All Blacks were able to poke more holes in the defensive system of Eagle Stars, earning them two more tries, which proved vital in securing them a valuable away victory."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For Eagle Stars, it's back to the drawing board, knowing full well that they can compete with the big dogs in the league on any day - now it's just a matter of finishing the opponent off when the opportunity arises."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was one of those games that Eagle Stars will certainly know could have gone either way.","html":"This was one of those games that Eagle Stars will certainly know could have gone either way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Eagles Stars, Averon Jafta, Ezhrin Damane and Renier Jantjies each scored a try, with Junaid Ruiters converting two tries.","html":"For Eagles Stars, Averon Jafta, Ezhrin Damane and Renier Jantjies each scored a try, with Junaid Ruiters converting two tries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The All Blacks' tries were scored by John Jackson, Tshepo Moopela, Altheabo Matolla, EAJ Carew and Gerard Malgas. Jason Plaatjies slotted one conversion.","html":"The All Blacks' tries were scored by John Jackson, Tshepo Moopela, Altheabo Matolla, EAJ Carew and Gerard Malgas. Jason Plaatjies slotted one conversion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An Eagle Stars player loses the ball in a tackle.B team","html":"An Eagle Stars player loses the ball in a tackle.B team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eagle Stars' B team were thumped 24-3, and trailed 7-0 at the break. For the All Blacks, Keanu Goliath scored a try, with Nigel Buys scoring a brace. Roberto Botha made no mistake with his conversion kick, while Herschelle Botha was successful with two conversions.","html":"Eagle Stars' B team were thumped 24-3, and trailed 7-0 at the break. For the All Blacks, Keanu Goliath scored a try, with Nigel Buys scoring a brace. Roberto Botha made no mistake with his conversion kick, while Herschelle Botha was successful with two conversions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The All Blacks players receive a warm welcome from the crowd and their opponents. Photo supplied","html":"The All Blacks players receive a warm welcome from the crowd and their opponents. Photo supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"C team","html":"C team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The day started with both clubs fielding development teams, to make sure there was a full day of rugby. Although the First League A competition does not require clubs to have three teams, both clubs gave young players the opportunity to display their talents, and entertain the crowd who attended this match.","html":"The day started with both clubs fielding development teams, to make sure there was a full day of rugby. Although the First League A competition does not require clubs to have three teams, both clubs gave young players the opportunity to display their talents, and entertain the crowd who attended this match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams played with passion and determination.","html":"Both teams played with passion and determination."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The result was of this battle was of little importance, as for both teams as this was clearly a case where rugby was the big winner at the end of the day.","html":"The result was of this battle was of little importance, as for both teams as this was clearly a case where rugby was the big winner at the end of the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
